questionHtml: Explain how the function of DNA is linked to its molecular structure.
markschemeHtml:
1.  DNA base sequence provides information;
  2.  gene expression / genes provides a template for the construction of a protein;
  3.  transcription occurs / mRNA is built using DNA as a template;
  4.  DNA nucleotide structure described/sugar and phosphate and base;
  5.  polymer of nucleotides makes a DNA strand;
  6.  DNA has two anti-parallel strands;
  7.  complementary base pairs/A pairs with T and C with G;
  8.  strands linked by hydrogen bonding between bases;
  9.  double helix shape / helix held by hydrogen bonds;

Accept points in clearly labelled diagram

meta.title: Explain how the function of DNA is linked to its molecular structure.
breadcrumbLabels: A1.2.6. DNA as a double helix made of two antiparallel strands of nucleotides with two strands linked by hydrogen bonding between complementary base pairs
